title: turnera sidoides subsp. carnea
intro: Turnera sidoides subsp. carnea, also known as turnera or purple passionflower, is a plant species in the Turneraceae family, native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Turnera sidoides subsp. carnea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Herbal preparations of Turnera sidoides subsp. carnea include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
